ISessionStatusGetSessionAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns a database session.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Session
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Task<ISession> GetSessionAsync(
	IDictionary<string, string> userProps,
	ILoginEnvironment env,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

userProps
Type: System.Collections.GenericIDictionaryString, String
env
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.SessionILoginEnvironment
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: TaskISession
Remarks
Returns the previously authenticated session, if it is still valid. Otherwise, a new session is set up using one of the configured SSO providers. Returns null otherwise.
